name: tool_search
description:
Searches the available MCP tools by keyword, tag, or module. Returns tool names, descriptions, connector requirements, and capability tags. Useful for discovering which tool to use for a task.
Use when: user asks what tools are available, which tool handles a specific task, or which tools require API keys.
Scope: reads the local tool registry — no network access.
Not for: executing tools (call the tool directly), configuring credentials (use configure), or managing MCP client config (use the webapp).

query.description: Keyword to search in tool names and descriptions. Case-insensitive. Example: 'github', 'scan', 'commit'. Optional — omit to list all tools.

tags.description: Comma-separated tag filters. Valid tags: api_required, local_only, write_tool, read_only. Example: 'api_required,read_only'. Optional.

module.description: Filter by top-level module name. Example: 'code', 'data', 'tools', 'memory'. Optional.
